CustomField.label: Cancelled At
CustomField.description: Timestamp this appointment was cancelled, paired with VS_Status__c = Cancelled so a cancellation is auditable (when, not just whether) -- supports the 4-hour cut-off check (D-010) and the audit-trail retention class (Annexure C4). THIS TICKET (VS-08) DEFINES THE FIELD ONLY: it is stamped by VS_BookingService.cancel() (VS-11, Apex, dev-senior) on a successful cancellation -- no automation sets it in this ticket.
